blended.narrative: Gunstock Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 45°F.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
